transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste! Thank you for calling PhysicsWallah. This is Priya, how can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Hi, namaste! Main NEET preparation ke baare mein jaanna chahti hun. Mera naam Ananya hai.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Ananya! Nice to meet you. NEET preparation ke liye call kiya hai, that's great! Aap currently which class mein ho?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Main class 12th mein hun. Actually mujhe thoda late realize hua hai ki mujhe proper coaching chahiye NEET ke liye.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No worries Ananya, it's never too late! Class 12th mein ho toh perfect timing hai. NEET 2025 ke liye prepare kar rahi ho ya 2026?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: 2025 ke liye! Bas 4 mahine bache hain, isliye main worried hun. Kya itne kam time mein kuch ho sakta hai?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Absolutely Ananya! 4 months agar properly utilize karoge toh bahut kuch possible hai. Humare paas NEET Yakeen course hai jo specially designed hai intensive preparation ke liye. Current mein koi coaching le rahi ho?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Nahi, main mostly self-study kar rahi thi. But ab lagta hai structured approach chahiye. Yakeen course mein kya included hai?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: NEET Yakeen mein complete syllabus coverage hai with live classes, recorded lectures, test series, doubt solving sessions, and personal mentorship. Price 33999 rupees hai, but EMI option bhi hai 3299 rupees per month.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Okay, price toh reasonable lagta hai. Main independent decision le sakti hun, parents already discuss kar chuke hain. Classes kab start hoti hain?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's wonderful Ananya! Classes immediately start ho jaati hain enrollment ke baad. Tumhe live classes, recorded content, everything access mil jaayega instantly. Koi specific subject mein focus chahiye?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Biology mein main strong hun, but Physics and Chemistry mein improvement chahiye. Doubt clearing sessions regularly hote hain na?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Haan bilkul! Daily doubt clearing sessions hote hain, plus personal mentors bhi assigned hote hain. Physics aur Chemistry ke liye special focus modules bhi hain. 4 months mein targeted preparation kar sakte ho.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Perfect! Mujhe ye course suitable lagta hai. I want to start immediately — what is the fastest way to enroll?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great decision Ananya! Main abhi enrollment process start kar deti hun. EMI option chahiye ya full payment? EMI mein 0% interest hai through PW Pay.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: EMI option sounds good. 3299 per month for how many months exactly?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: 10 months ka EMI plan hai at 3299 rupees per month. Main abhi enrollment link send kar deti hun. Aap payment complete karte hi access mil jaayega. Phone number confirm kar sakti ho?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Haan, my number is 9 8 7 6 5 4 3 2 1 0. Link send kar dijiye, main abhi payment kar dungi.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect Ananya! Link sending now. Payment complete hone ke baad welcome email aayega with login details. All the best for your NEET preparation! Koi aur questions?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Thank you so much Priya! Bahut helpful rahi aap. Main link ka wait kar rahi hun. Excited hun start karne ke liye!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're most welcome Ananya! Link sent! Welcome to PW family. Agar koi help chahiye toh call kar sakti ho. Best of luck, aap definitely crack kar sakti ho NEET!

promised_actions: Send course details and enrollment link

slack_message.preview: 🔥 HOT lead: Ananya Reddy, NEET, Class 12, Hyderabad. High intent, ready to enroll. Immediate callback recommended.

email.subject: Your NEET Preparation Plan — PhysicsWallah
email.preview: Hi Ananya, it was great speaking with you today! Based on your preparation goals, I've put together a personalized plan for your NEET journey.

crm_record.notes: High engagement, self decision-maker. Likely to convert with one follow-up call.
